---
listing:
    contents: posts
    type: table
    fields: [title, date-modified]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Title"
      date-modified: "Date"
    date-format: YYYY‑MM‑DD
    table-hover: true
    categories: true
    page-size: 999
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    sort: 
      - date-modified desc
      - date desc
---
